notes: Doesn't open. Didn't try the tweaks though.

title: Staxel

notes: It installs the usual additional software but then doesn't start.
title: Staxel

notes:
Proton 4.2-7 the launcher actually starts. Throws up two warnings. One about mono found, but recommends "dotnet clr".  Another about missing Wow64 mode. Startup then hangs when trying to associate file extensions and setup firewall rules. If you close the blank terminal window it will continue and then give you this error.
System.Exception: Staxel.Client.exe process closed quickly with error code: 0x00
  at Plukit.Base.FormExtensions+NativeMethods.StartProcess (System.String path, System.String args) [0x000bd] in <c24ce2c511564cb296b8e9df19f601b9>:0 
  at Plukit.Base.FormExtensions.StartProcess (System.String path, System.String args) [0x00000] in <c24ce2c511564cb296b8e9df19f601b9>:0 
  at Staxel.SteamLauncher.SteamLauncherForm.RunGame () [0x000a3] in <b483f77afd484e89aead7286e71d3c08>:0
title: Staxel

notes:
Proton 4.11-5 starts up, but the first window throws up two warnings. 
1: "Mono runtime detected, dotnet clr" recommended" 
2: "Detected Wow64 mode: False"
Next window hangs on "Running elevated setup to associate file extensions and setup firewall rules" 
If you close the blank terminal window it will continue, but eventually gives you a error window with this:
System.Exception: Staxel.Client.exe process closed quickly with error code: 0x00
  at Plukit.Base.FormExtensions+NativeMethods.StartProcess (System.String path, System.String args) [0x000bd] in <d854581fdec14985aabfe1b781ea3a2f>:0 
  at Plukit.Base.FormExtensions.StartProcess (System.String path, System.String args) [0x00000] in <d854581fdec14985aabfe1b781ea3a2f>:0 
  at Staxel.SteamLauncher.SteamLauncherForm.RunGame () [0x000a3] in <713aba7031db4d0bbbdff41ed7ce2bb5>:0
